item.description: I bought a Fujifilm X100VI for Christmas. Normally I am a Sony shooter (Sony A7RIII), I have been very happy with my camera since I bought it in 2018.

item.title: Youtube videos I like
item.description: How did the world get so ugly? I Wish I Knew this when I Started Acrylic Painting Six things I would fix about Music Theory - I would implement every single modification here proposed Mariló Montero puede decir lo que quiera en TVE How does the Spanish state manipulate the news in the public media?...

item.title: Books read in 2026
item.description: Books I have been reading this year La Guerra Civil (graphic novel)- Paul Preston y José Pablo García. (3.5).

item.title: Recommended books
item.description: A few goods I would recommend, in no particular order. I hope this list grows to at least 1000 books one day.

item.title: 100 great movies
item.description: Made this list some time ago, it is due for an update.

item.title: Science is less deterministic than you think
item.description: This is a comment on the paper Same data, different analysts Unless you have been living under a rock, you know that we are in the midst of what historians may one day call “The Replication Crisis Era”.

item.title: Things I want to watch
item.description: A collection of documentaries, movies, youtube videos, etc that I would like to watch at some point.

item.title: A comic of Polyphemus
item.description: Today I have been doing something I had been waiting to do for a long time: a comic using AI.

item.title: Things I want to read
item.description: A (non-exhaustive) collection of books and articles that I would like to read at some point. I update this regularly when I get new recommendations.

item.title: Are species natural kinds?
item.description: I have always considered that species are natural kinds and organisms merely instances of a general class.
